EmailTemplate.name: Payment Failed
EmailTemplate.subject: Important Payment Information Required
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
We need to speak with you regarding payment for your insurance cover. Unfortunately, the payment we attempted on xx.xx.xx has failed and the payment remains outstanding.
Please contact us immediately so we can process a payment and ensure your cover remains in place.
You can call us directly on 01242 808 740
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
